title: Custom Server Hosting Stuck On Queue

messages.content: # Is your server stuck on Spawning forever? Follow this guide!

# Prerequisite:

> For all **NON tier 3 users** ensure that your daily limit timer is **not **at 00h00m.

** **
### If the above does *not* apply to you, please do the following:

# Method 1:
> 1. Click "Edit Preset"
> 2. Click "Save Preset & Restart Server" 
> 3. The server will restart/ requeue

# Method 2:
> 1. Select a different region
> 2. Revert back to your original region
> 3. The server will restart/ requeue

# Method 3:
If the above did **NOT** fix it:
> Hard refresh the website by pressing: `Control + Shift + R`

### If that still does not work, please get in contact with support staff via: <#991299200782446632> or <#964650227342655499>
